Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Xingye Telecommunication Devices and Materials Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Xingye Telecommunication Equipment Co., Ltd. is a highly magical combination of a 'historical Frankenstein' and a 'universal proxy shell in a downtown podium building.' The forensic engine has forcefully cleared the underlying transnational consumer electronics OEM data pollution caused by Apple Inc. The official commercial registry system was completely blinded by the extremely intimidating 'communication equipment (production, sales)' and the ten-million-level registered capital in its license, mechanically classifying it into the high-tech 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and historical timeline directly launched the highest level of demotion strike: this is a living fossil-level old enterprise established in 1995. Its paid-in capital is up to 10 million, but its 2023 insured headcount is surprisingly a pitiful '3 people'! What's even more laughable is its historical former name: it used to be called 'Dongguan Granite Stone Factory Nanjing Sales Department'! A sales department selling granite transformed into a ten-million-level telecom equipment manufacturing plant? Its registered address is located on the 'fourth floor of the podium building at No. 57-14 Chengxian Street, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City,' which is a commercial podium building around the extremely bustling Zhujiang Road Computer City in the city center. In a downtown podium building on the fourth floor, relying on 3 employees to 'manufacture' communication equipment? This is a complete industrial sci-fi novel. Looking again at its business license, it sells everything from communication equipment all the way to 'knitwear and textiles,' 'chemical products,' and even intends to do 'interior decoration.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a communication equipment manufacturing plant. This is a Three-Person Universal Trading & Engineering Shell cloaked in ten million in capital. The boss retains this 30-year-old shell purely to act as a middleman selling equipment everywhere (from cables to building materials), while incidentally taking on some postal and telecommunications engineering and interior decoration jobs.
